---
pagetitle: "RC42 Resources"
description: "Academic materials, publications, datasets, teaching resources, and tools shared by the RC42 community."
toc: false
page-layout: full
title-block-style: none
execute:
  echo: false
  warning: false
  message: false
---

```{css, echo=FALSE}
/* FIX FOR QUARTO STICKY ISSUE */
.resources-page,
.resources-inner,
.resources-layout,
.resources-toc-col,
.resources-main,
#quarto-content,
.page-columns,
.page-layout-full,
.page-full,
main.content {
  overflow: visible !important;
  transform: none !important;
  contain: none !important;
}

/* Base Layout */
.resources-page {
  font-family: var(--bs-body-font-family, system-ui, -apple-system, sans-serif);
  color: #334155;
  width: 100%;
}

.resources-inner {
  width: min(100% - 48px, 1440px);
  margin-inline: auto;
}

/* Compact Header */
.resources-header {
  margin-bottom: 2rem;
  padding-bottom: 1.5rem;
  border-bottom: 1px solid #e2e8f0;
  display: flex;
  flex-direction: column;
  align-items: flex-start;
  max-width: 900px;
}
.header-eyebrow {
  font-size: 0.85rem;
  font-weight: 700;
  text-transform: uppercase;
  letter-spacing: 0.05em;
  color: #0d9488;
  margin-bottom: 0.25rem;
}
.resources-header h1 {
  font-size: 2.25rem;
  color: #1e293b;
  margin: 0 0 0.5rem 0;
  font-weight: 700;
}
.resources-header .subtitle {
  font-size: 1.15rem;
  color: #334155;
  font-weight: 600;
  margin-bottom: 0.5rem;
}
.resources-header p {
  font-size: 1rem;
  color: #475569;
  line-height: 1.5;
  max-width: 800px;
  margin: 0 0 1rem 0;
}
.btn-submit {
  display: inline-flex;
  align-items: center;
  background: #0d9488;
  color: white;
  padding: 0.5rem 1rem;
  border-radius: 6px;
  text-decoration: none !important;
  font-weight: 600;
  font-size: 0.95rem;
  transition: background 0.2s;
}
.btn-submit:hover {
  background: #0f766e;
  color: white;
}

/* Two-column Layout */
.resources-layout {
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: minmax(760px, 1fr) 300px;
  gap: 56px;
  align-items: start;
  padding-bottom: 4rem;
}

.resources-main {
  min-width: 0;
  width: 100%;
}

.resources-toc-col {
  width: 300px;
  min-width: 300px;
}

/* Sidebar TOC */
.resources-toc {
  position: sticky;
  top: 96px;
  max-height: calc(100vh - 120px);
  overflow-y: auto;
  background: #f8fafc;
  border: 1px solid #dbe3ef;
  border-radius: 18px;
  padding: 24px;
  box-shadow: 0 12px 28px rgba(15, 23, 42, 0.08);
}
.resources-toc h3 {
  font-size: 0.9rem;
  text-transform: uppercase;
  letter-spacing: 0.05em;
  color: #64748b;
  margin-top: 0;
  margin-bottom: 1rem;
  font-weight: 700;
}

.toc-nav {
  list-style: none;
  padding: 0;
  margin: 0;
  display: flex;
  flex-direction: column;
  gap: 0.25rem;
}

.toc-section-item {
  display: flex;
  flex-direction: column;
}

.toc-link {
  display: flex;
  justify-content: space-between;
  align-items: center;
  padding: 0.5rem 0.75rem;
  color: #475569;
  text-decoration: none !important;
  border-radius: 6px;
  font-size: 0.95rem;
  transition: all 0.2s;
  border-left: 3px solid transparent;
}

.toc-link:hover {
  background: #f1f5f9;
  color: #0d9488;
}

.toc-count {
  font-size: 0.75rem;
  background: #e2e8f0;
  color: #475569;
  padding: 0.1rem 0.4rem;
  border-radius: 12px;
  font-weight: 600;
}

.toc-section-item.is-active .toc-link {
  background: #eef6f6;
  color: #00897b;
  border-left: 3px solid #0aa79d;
  font-weight: 600;
}

.toc-section-item.is-active .toc-count {
  background: #ccfbf1;
  color: #00796b;
}

.toc-preview {
  list-style: none;
  margin: 8px 0 0 0;
  padding-left: 14px;
  font-size: 0.78rem;
  line-height: 1.35;
  color: #64748b;
  border-left: 2px solid #e2e8f0;
  margin-left: 0.75rem;
}

.toc-preview li {
  margin-bottom: 0.4rem;
}

.toc-preview a {
  color: inherit;
  text-decoration: none !important;
}

.toc-preview a:hover {
  color: #0d9488;
}

@media (max-width: 1100px) {
  .resources-layout {
    grid-template-columns: 1fr;
    gap: 2rem;
  }
  .resources-toc-col {
    width: 100%;
    min-width: 0;
    order: -1;
  }
  .resources-toc {
    position: static;
    max-height: none;
    overflow-y: visible;
    box-shadow: none;
    padding: 1.5rem;
    margin-bottom: 1rem;
  }
  .toc-preview {
    display: none !important;
  }
}

/* Metrics Row */
.resources-metrics {
  display: flex;
  flex-wrap: wrap;
  gap: 2rem;
  margin-bottom: 1.5rem;
}
.metric-item {
  display: flex;
  flex-direction: column;
}
.metric-value {
  font-size: 1.5rem;
  font-weight: 700;
  color: #1e293b;
}
.metric-label {
  font-size: 0.8rem;
  color: #64748b;
  text-transform: uppercase;
  letter-spacing: 0.05em;
  font-weight: 600;
}

/* Search */
.resources-search-container {
  margin-bottom: 2rem;
  position: relative;
}
.search-bar {
  width: 100%;
  padding: 0.85rem 1.25rem;
  border: 1px solid #cbd5e1;
  border-radius: 8px;
  font-size: 1rem;
  background: #f8fafc;
  color: #334155;
  transition: all 0.2s;
}
.search-bar:focus {
  outline: none;
  border-color: #0d9488;
  background: #ffffff;
  box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px rgba(13, 148, 136, 0.1);
}

/* Directory Sections */
.resources-section {
  margin-bottom: 2.5rem;
  scroll-margin-top: 110px;
}
.resources-section h2 {
  font-size: 1.5rem;
  color: #1e293b;
  margin-top: 0;
  margin-bottom: 0.25rem;
  padding-bottom: 0.5rem;
  border-bottom: 2px solid #e2e8f0;
}
.resources-section > p {
  color: #64748b;
  font-size: 0.95rem;
  margin-bottom: 1.25rem;
}

/* Directory Listing (Compact Row) */
.resource-directory {
  display: flex;
  flex-direction: column;
}
.resource-item {
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: minmax(0, 1fr) auto;
  gap: 24px;
  padding: 28px 0;
  border-bottom: 1px solid #e2e8f0;
  scroll-margin-top: 110px;
}
@media (max-width: 768px) {
  .resource-item {
    grid-template-columns: 1fr;
    gap: 1rem;
  }
}
.resource-item:last-child {
  border-bottom: none;
}

.resource-main-content {
  display: flex;
  flex-direction: column;
  gap: 0.35rem;
}

.resource-title {
  font-size: 1.15rem;
  font-weight: 700;
  color: #183a8a;
  text-decoration: none !important;
  line-height: 1.3;
}
.resource-title:hover {
  text-decoration: underline !important;
  color: #1e40af;
}

.resource-author-type {
  font-size: 0.9rem;
  color: #475569;
  font-weight: 500;
}
.resource-author-type .type-dot {
  margin: 0 0.4rem;
  color: #cbd5e1;
}

.resource-description {
  font-size: 0.95rem;
  color: #334155;
  line-height: 1.5;
  margin: 0.25rem 0;
}

.resource-meta {
  display: flex;
  flex-wrap: wrap;
  gap: 0.6rem;
  font-size: 0.8rem;
  color: #64748b;
  align-items: center;
  margin-top: 0.25rem;
}

.resource-badge {
  font-size: 0.7rem;
  padding: 0.15rem 0.4rem;
  border-radius: 4px;
  background: #f1f5f9;
  color: #475569;
  border: 1px solid #e2e8f0;
  font-weight: 600;
  text-transform: uppercase;
  letter-spacing: 0.05em;
}
.badge-verified {
  background: #ecfdf5;
  color: #059669;
  border-color: #a7f3d0;
}

.resource-tags {
  font-size: 0.8rem;
  color: #64748b;
  margin-top: 0.25rem;
  display: flex;
  flex-wrap: wrap;
  gap: 0.4rem;
}
.resource-chip {
  background: #f8fafc;
  border: 1px solid #e2e8f0;
  padding: 0.1rem 0.5rem;
  border-radius: 12px;
  color: #64748b;
}

.resource-action {
  white-space: nowrap;
  font-weight: 700;
}
.resource-link-btn {
  font-size: 0.9rem;
  font-weight: 700;
  color: #00897b;
  text-decoration: none !important;
  display: inline-flex;
  align-items: center;
}
.resource-link-btn:hover {
  color: #00695c;
  text-decoration: underline !important;
}
```

<section class="resources-page">
<div class="resources-inner">

<header class="resources-header">
<div class="header-eyebrow">RC42 Resources</div>
<h1>Resources</h1>
<p>Academic materials, publications, datasets, teaching resources, and tools shared by the RC42 community.</p>
<a href="#" class="btn-submit">Submit Contribution &rarr;</a>
</header>

```{r, results="asis"}
suppressPackageStartupMessages(library(readr))
suppressPackageStartupMessages(library(dplyr))

html_escape <- function(text) {
  if (is.na(text)) return(NA_character_)
  text <- gsub("&", "&amp;", text)
  text <- gsub("<", "&lt;", text)
  text <- gsub(">", "&gt;", text)
  text <- gsub('"', "&quot;", text)
  text <- gsub("'", "&#39;", text)
  text
}

get_col <- function(data, col) {
  if (col %in% names(data)) data[[col]] else rep(NA_character_, nrow(data))
}

csv_path <- "rc42_resources_workflow.csv"

if (!file.exists(csv_path)) {
  cat("<div class='resources-layout'><div style='text-align: center; color: #475569; padding: 2rem;'>Resources are currently unavailable. Please try again later.</div></div>\n")
} else {
  # Safe block execution to prevent page breakage
  tryCatch({
    res_data <- read_csv(csv_path, show_col_types = FALSE)
    
    placement <- get_col(res_data, "Suggested placement")
    category_orig <- get_col(res_data, "Category")
    
    res_data$final_category <- ifelse(!is.na(placement) & trimws(placement) != "", 
                                     trimws(placement), 
                                     trimws(category_orig))
    
    res_data$Title <- get_col(res_data, "Title")
    res_data$Author_Institution <- get_col(res_data, "Author / Institution")
    res_data$Resource_type <- get_col(res_data, "Resource type")
    res_data$Description <- get_col(res_data, "Description")
    res_data$Tags <- get_col(res_data, "Tags")
    res_data$Access_type <- get_col(res_data, "Access type")
    res_data$Language <- get_col(res_data, "Language")
    res_data$Region_scope <- get_col(res_data, "Region scope")
    res_data$Verification_status <- get_col(res_data, "Verification status")
    res_data$URL <- get_col(res_data, "URL")
    
    res_data$rank_num <- suppressWarnings(as.numeric(get_col(res_data, "Priority rank")))
    res_data$rank_num[is.na(res_data$rank_num) | res_data$rank_num == 0] <- 999999
    
    # Sort
    res_data <- res_data %>% arrange(rank_num, Title)
    
    # Generate stable IDs
    res_data$stable_id <- paste0("resource-", seq_len(nrow(res_data)))
    
    total_res <- nrow(res_data)
    pubs <- sum(res_data$final_category == "Publications", na.rm = TRUE)
    teach <- sum(res_data$final_category == "Teaching Resources", na.rm = TRUE)
    data_tools <- sum(res_data$final_category == "Datasets & Tools", na.rm = TRUE)
    blogs <- sum(res_data$final_category == "Blog / Posts", na.rm = TRUE)
    
    cats_info <- list(
      "Publications" = list(
        id = "publications",
        desc = "Recent books, special journal issues, journals, and significant articles relevant to sociological social psychology.",
        count = pubs
      ),
      "Teaching Resources" = list(
        id = "teaching-resources",
        desc = "Syllabi, course outlines, assignments, and pedagogical materials for teaching social psychology.",
        count = teach
      ),
      "Datasets & Tools" = list(
        id = "datasets-tools",
        desc = "Open datasets, methodological tools, and resources useful for comparative sociological research.",
        count = data_tools
      ),
      "Blog / Posts" = list(
        id = "blog-posts",
        desc = "Short essays, reflections, calls, field notes, and member contributions.",
        count = blogs
      )
    )

    cat('<div class="resources-layout">\n')
    
    # --- Main Content Area ---
    cat('<main class="resources-main">\n')
    
    # Overview Metrics
    cat('<div id="overview" class="resources-section js-section" data-resource-section="overview" style="margin-bottom: 0;">\n')
    cat('<div class="resources-metrics">\n')
    cat(sprintf('<div class="metric-item"><span class="metric-value">%d</span><span class="metric-label">Total Resources</span></div>\n', total_res))
    cat(sprintf('<div class="metric-item"><span class="metric-value">%d</span><span class="metric-label">Publications</span></div>\n', pubs))
    cat(sprintf('<div class="metric-item"><span class="metric-value">%d</span><span class="metric-label">Teaching</span></div>\n', teach))
    cat(sprintf('<div class="metric-item"><span class="metric-value">%d</span><span class="metric-label">Datasets</span></div>\n', data_tools))
    cat('</div>\n')
    cat('</div>\n')
    
    # Search
    cat('<div class="resources-search-container">\n')
    cat('<label for="resources-search" class="visually-hidden">Search resources</label>\n')
    cat('<input type="text" id="resources-search" class="search-bar" placeholder="Search by title, author, description, or tags..." />\n')
    cat('</div>\n')
    
    # Directory Sections
    for (cname in names(cats_info)) {
      cinfo <- cats_info[[cname]]
      cat_items <- res_data %>% filter(final_category == cname)
      
      if (nrow(cat_items) == 0) next
      
      cat(sprintf('<section class="resources-section js-section" id="%s" data-resource-section="%s">\n', cinfo$id, cinfo$id))
      cat(sprintf('<h2>%s</h2>\n<p>%s</p>\n', html_escape(cname), html_escape(cinfo$desc)))
      
      cat('<div class="resource-directory">\n')
      
      for (i in seq_len(nrow(cat_items))) {
        row <- cat_items[i, ]
        
        title_escaped <- html_escape(ifelse(is.na(row$Title), "Untitled", row$Title))
        url_escaped <- html_escape(ifelse(is.na(row$URL), "#", row$URL))
        author <- ifelse(is.na(row$Author_Institution), "", html_escape(row$Author_Institution))
        res_type <- ifelse(is.na(row$Resource_type), "", html_escape(row$Resource_type))
        desc <- ifelse(is.na(row$Description), "", html_escape(row$Description))
        stable_id <- row$stable_id
        
        # Badges / Meta
        meta_parts <- c()
        if (!is.na(row$Language)) meta_parts <- c(meta_parts, paste("Language:", html_escape(row$Language)))
        if (!is.na(row$Access_type)) meta_parts <- c(meta_parts, paste("Access:", html_escape(row$Access_type)))
        if (!is.na(row$Verification_status) && grepl("verified", tolower(row$Verification_status))) {
          meta_parts <- c(meta_parts, '<span class="resource-badge badge-verified">Verified</span>')
        } else if (!is.na(row$Verification_status)) {
          meta_parts <- c(meta_parts, paste("Status:", html_escape(row$Verification_status)))
        }
        
        meta_html <- ""
        if (length(meta_parts) > 0) {
          meta_html <- sprintf('<div class="resource-meta">%s</div>', paste(meta_parts, collapse=' <span style="color:#cbd5e1;">&middot;</span> '))
        }
        
        # Tags
        tags_html <- ""
        if (!is.na(row$Tags)) {
          tag_list <- trimws(unlist(strsplit(row$Tags, ";")))
          tag_list <- tag_list[tag_list != ""]
          if (length(tag_list) > 0) {
            tags_html <- sprintf('<div class="resource-tags">%s</div>', 
                                 paste(sprintf('<span class="resource-chip">%s</span>', sapply(tag_list, html_escape)), collapse=" "))
          }
        }
        
        # Combine Author & Type
        author_type_html <- ""
        if (author != "" && res_type != "") {
          author_type_html <- sprintf('<div class="resource-author-type">%s <span class="type-dot">&middot;</span> %s</div>', author, res_type)
        } else if (author != "") {
          author_type_html <- sprintf('<div class="resource-author-type">%s</div>', author)
        } else if (res_type != "") {
          author_type_html <- sprintf('<div class="resource-author-type">%s</div>', res_type)
        }
        
        # Search data string
        search_data <- html_escape(tolower(paste(
          ifelse(is.na(row$Title), "", row$Title), 
          ifelse(is.na(row$Author_Institution), "", row$Author_Institution), 
          ifelse(is.na(row$Description), "", row$Description), 
          ifelse(is.na(row$Tags), "", row$Tags), 
          ifelse(is.na(row$Resource_type), "", row$Resource_type), 
          sep=" "
        )))
        
        cat(sprintf('<article class="resource-item js-item" id="%s" data-search="%s">\n', stable_id, search_data))
        cat('<div class="resource-main-content">\n')
        cat(sprintf('<a href="%s" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer" class="resource-title">%s</a>\n', url_escaped, title_escaped))
        if (author_type_html != "") cat(author_type_html, "\n")
        if (desc != "") cat(sprintf('<div class="resource-description">%s</div>\n', desc))
        if (meta_html != "") cat(meta_html, "\n")
        if (tags_html != "") cat(tags_html, "\n")
        cat('</div>\n')
        
        cat('<div class="resource-action">\n')
        if (url_escaped != "#") {
          cat(sprintf('<a href="%s" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer" class="resource-link-btn">Open resource &rarr;</a>\n', url_escaped))
        }
        cat('</div>\n')
        
        cat('</article>\n') # resource-item
      }
      
      cat('</div>\n') # resource-directory
      cat('</section>\n') # resources-section
    }
    
    cat('</main>\n') # resources-main
    
    # --- Sidebar TOC Area ---
    cat('<aside class="resources-toc-col">\n')
    cat('<nav class="resources-toc" aria-label="Resources navigation">\n')
    cat('<h3>On this page</h3>\n')
    cat('<ul class="toc-nav">\n')
    cat(sprintf('<li class="toc-section-item" data-target="overview"><a href="#overview" class="toc-link"><span>Overview</span> <span class="toc-count">%d</span></a></li>\n', total_res))
    
    for (cname in names(cats_info)) {
      cinfo <- cats_info[[cname]]
      if (cinfo$count > 0) {
        cat(sprintf('<li class="toc-section-item" data-target="%s">\n', cinfo$id))
        cat(sprintf('<a href="#%s" class="toc-link"><span>%s</span> <span class="toc-count">%d</span></a>\n', cinfo$id, html_escape(cname), cinfo$count))
        
        # Sublist for active TOC expansion
        cat_items <- res_data %>% filter(final_category == cname)
        top_items <- head(cat_items, 3) # Max 3 items as requested
        
        cat('<ul class="toc-preview" hidden>\n')
        for (i in seq_len(nrow(top_items))) {
          short_title <- top_items$Title[i]
          if (is.na(short_title)) short_title <- "Untitled"
          if (nchar(short_title) > 40) short_title <- paste0(substr(short_title, 1, 37), "...")
          cat(sprintf('<li><a href="#%s">%s</a></li>\n', top_items$stable_id[i], html_escape(short_title)))
        }
        cat('</ul>\n')
        cat('</li>\n')
      }
    }
    cat('</ul>\n')
    cat('</nav>\n')
    cat('</aside>\n')
    
    cat('</div>\n') # resources-layout
    
  }, error = function(e) {
    cat("<div class='resources-layout'><div style='text-align: center; color: #475569; padding: 2rem;'>Resources are currently unavailable. Please try again later.</div></div>\n")
  })
}
```

</div>
</section>

```{=html}
<script>
document.addEventListener("DOMContentLoaded", () => {
  const sections = document.querySelectorAll("[data-resource-section]");
  const tocItems = document.querySelectorAll(".toc-section-item");

  function setActive(id) {
    tocItems.forEach(item => {
      const active = item.dataset.target === id;
      item.classList.toggle("is-active", active);

      const preview = item.querySelector(".toc-preview");
      if (preview) preview.hidden = !active;
    });
  }

  const observer = new IntersectionObserver((entries) => {
    const visible = entries
      .filter(entry => entry.isIntersecting)
      .sort((a, b) => b.intersectionRatio - a.intersectionRatio)[0];

    if (visible) {
      setActive(visible.target.dataset.resourceSection);
    }
  }, {
    root: null,
    rootMargin: "-120px 0px -55% 0px",
    threshold: [0.15, 0.3, 0.6]
  });

  sections.forEach(section => observer.observe(section));

  // Search logic
  const searchInput = document.getElementById("resources-search");
  const items = document.querySelectorAll(".js-item");
  const allSections = document.querySelectorAll(".js-section");

  if (searchInput) {
    searchInput.addEventListener("input", function(e) {
      const query = e.target.value.toLowerCase().trim();

      items.forEach(item => {
        const searchData = item.getAttribute("data-search") || "";
        if (query === "" || searchData.includes(query)) {
          item.style.display = "";
        } else {
          item.style.display = "none";
        }
      });

      allSections.forEach(section => {
        if (section.id === "overview") return; 
        const visibleItems = section.querySelectorAll(".js-item[style*='display: none']").length < section.querySelectorAll(".js-item").length;
        if (!visibleItems && query !== "") {
          section.style.display = "none";
        } else {
          section.style.display = "block";
        }
      });
    });
  }
});
</script>
```
